redactors.name: Standard PII Redactor
redactors.description: Redacts common PII including names, emails, phone numbers, and addresses

redactors.name: HIPAA Redactor
redactors.description: Redacts all PHI elements as defined by HIPAA Safe Harbor guidelines

redactors.name: PCI Redactor
redactors.description: Redacts payment card data including PANs, CVVs, and expiration dates

redactors.name: Financial Redactor
redactors.description: Redacts financial information including bank accounts and routing numbers

redactors.name: Full Redactor
redactors.description: Comprehensive redaction of all detected sensitive data types

redactors.name: GDPR Redactor
redactors.description: Redacts personal data as defined by GDPR Article 4

redactors.name: CCPA Redactor
redactors.description: Redacts personal information as defined by CCPA
